results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor confirmed at 0.0. New within-window evidence (Jul 17 Gaza funeral strike: 7 killed, 22 wounded; cumulative post-ceasefire toll 1,123 killed since Oct 2025) is consistent with the existing absolute-floor designation.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor confirmed at 0.0. New within-window evidence (Sumy glide-bomb Jul 15: 5 killed; UN OHCHR 65,044 verified civilian casualties, sharp H1-2026 rise) is consistent with the standing absolute-floor designation.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmed at 0.0. New within-window evidence (RSF siege of El Obeid: ~500,000 trapped, water infrastructure bombed; European Parliament 476-28 RSF terrorist-designation vote; UN OHCHR catastrophe warning) is consistent with the standing absolute-floor designation.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Near-floor confirmed at ~2.5. This cycle's within-window event (US strikes on Iran, 50+ killed) places Iran as a victim of external force; per screening rule 3, being struck is not positive evidence and does not warrant an upgrade.

results.name: Democratic Republic of C
results.key_finding: Near-floor confirmed at ~2.3. New within-window evidence (Ebola death toll 930, fastest-growing outbreak on record, dozens of health workers dead) is consistent with the standing near-floor designation set on 2026-07-18.

results.name: Palestine
results.key_finding: Confirmed at ~25 (Developing). New within-window evidence (OCHA: 40 killed, 127 injured Jul 8-15; 6 journalists killed; 3,200+ West Bank displaced by settler violence) documents suffering largely inflicted upon, not by, the assessed entity.

results.name: Azerbaijan
results.key_finding: Confirmed at ~9 (Critical). Within-window border violence with Armenia (Jul 12-16) plus HRW/Freedom House/RSF documentation of escalating internal repression is consistent with the published 9.4.

results.name: Gabon
results.key_finding: Confirmed at ~20 (Developing). Within-window evidence (Jul 20 request for French intervention over the jailed opposition leader) plus BTI 2026 and CIVICUS documentation is consistent with the published 20.3.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Confirmed at ~16-17 (Critical). New within-window evidence (Operation Shaaban militant-death toll 91 by Jul 16, second week of near-daily reports) continues the picture underlying the 2026-07-20 assessment and the May band-crossing to Critical.

results.name: Algiers
results.key_finding: Confirmed at ~21 (Developing). The Jul 16 orphanage fire (11 killed, 19 injured) is a single incident weighed against Algiers' genuine emergency-response capacity (DGPC; 913 fire responses since Jul 8) — it does not dominate the 40-subdimension profile.

results.name: Delhi
results.key_finding: Confirmed at ~32 (Developing). The Jul 20 protest crackdown (tear gas, batons on 10,000+) is one within-window data point; it is weighed against substantial MCD service infrastructure (13 hospitals, welfare centres, surplus budget).

results.name: Ibadan
results.key_finding: Confirmed at ~18 (Critical). The Jul 8 Ojoo ethnic clash (2 killed) and the state's de-escalation-plus-demolition response are one data point in a weak-capacity municipal profile.

results.name: Tucson
results.key_finding: Confirmed at ~35 (Developing). The Jul 19 mass shooting (10 wounded) is one within-window data point; it is weighed against genuine municipal care infrastructure (Housing First: 3,322 served, 799 housed; 50-org collaboration; KPIs).

results.name: Verizon
results.key_finding: Confirmed at ~46 (Functional). The Jul 16 layoffs (274 stores, 500 more jobs; 16,600+ cumulative since Oct 2025 despite ~$5B quarterly profit) genuinely lower Verizon's Integrity dimension, but not enough to move the composite 5+ points.

results.name: Armenia
results.key_finding: Confirmed at ~47 (Functional). The within-window border violence (Jul 12-16) is a defensive security event; per screening rule 3 it does not lower Armenia's own compassion score.
